synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-1830 Oracle Linux 10 dpdk bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1830
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1830

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-1830.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
dpdk-24.11.3-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
dpdk-devel-24.11.3-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
dpdk-doc-24.11.3-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
dpdk-tools-24.11.3-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
dpdk-24.11.3-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
dpdk-devel-24.11.3-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
dpdk-doc-24.11.3-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
dpdk-tools-24.11.3-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/dpdk-24.11.3-1.el10_1.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[24.11.3-1]
- Rebase to 24.11.3 (RHEL-118668)
